promotionalText: The calm, focused tracker for your weight-loss shot — dose, injection sites, titration, side effects and weight. One honest price, no calorie maze.
description:
Titrra is the focused tracker built for the GLP-1 routine itself — not calories.

Generic food apps focus on calories. Reminder apps focus on alarms. Titrra is built around your weight-loss shot: log each dose, rotate your injection sites, follow your titration ladder, and track side effects and weight — all in one calm, premium app.

LOG EVERY DOSE
• One-tap “log this week's shot”
• Smart dose + injection-site suggestions so logging is a single tap
• A rotating 3D body map that suggests the next site so you never overuse one area

FOLLOW YOUR TITRATION LADDER
• See exactly where you are on your dose-escalation plan (e.g. 2.5 → 5 → 7.5 → 10 mg)
• Gentle prompts when it's time to talk to your provider about stepping up

TRACK WHAT MATTERS
• Side effects (nausea, constipation, fatigue, reflux and more) with severity, so you can spot patterns
• Weight trend over time with a simple, satisfying log
• Built for low appetite on GLP-1 — focus on the routine, not the calorie count

WORKS FOR YOUR MEDICATION
• Ozempic, Wegovy, Mounjaro, Zepbound, Rybelsus, and compounded semaglutide / tirzepatide
• Weekly injections or daily pills

ONE HONEST PRICE
• No confusing tiers, no weekly traps, no 10-option maze
• A single, fair plan — monthly, yearly, or lifetime

For tracking and education only. Not medical advice. Titrra never recommends a dose change — always talk to your healthcare provider.
